Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
H. Nelson Meeks, Esq. appeared with plaintiff William Yoshi, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Han Zhang Li.
Default entered against defendant on September 18, 2008.
Doe defendants to be dismissed today, March 18, 2008.
Statement of Damages filed August 14, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff William Yoshi, and against the Defaulted Defendant: Han Zhang Li as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,276.31.
Prejudgment Interest - Amount yet to be determined.
Costs - $278.00.
Total Judgment - To Be Determined.
Counsel shall prepare a proposed Judgment, and submit to the Court for review no later than Friday, March 21, 2008.
